name: XState
when_to_use: 需要真实执行带 guard、嵌套状态和事件序列的 statechart 时用它,而非只画状态图——原生静态图在转移判定、上下文变化与可回放快照上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能描述或画出状态机,不能可靠执行 guard、嵌套/并行状态与事件序列,也会臆测被拒绝转移后的状态；XState 产出确定的 actor snapshot 和转移轨迹。

data_in.note: data_in.machine 直接传给 XState v5 createMachine；事件对象必须至少有 type 字符串,其余字段为领域载荷,不预设统一事件词表。

machine.initial: string —— 必须命中 states 的一个顶层 key

<state key>.type?: 'atomic' | 'compound' | 'parallel' | 'final' | 'history' —— 默认由是否有子 states 推断,叶节点为 atomic
<state key>.initial?: string —— 子 states 的初态；无子 states 时默认无,compound 且有子 states 时必填
<state key>.states?: 同层 states map —— 子状态,默认无

on?.<event type>: target string | { target?: string（默认无目标）, guard?: string|function（默认无）, actions?: string|function|(string|function)[]（默认 []） }

schema.implementations?: { guards?: Record<string,function>（默认 {}）, actions?: Record<string,function>（默认 {}）, actors?: Record<string,actorLogic>（默认 {}）, delays?: Record<string,number|function>（默认 {}） } —— createMachine 第二参数,整体默认 {}
schema.events?: { type: string, [key: string]: unknown }[] —— 按顺序回放,默认 []

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵；它是真执行引擎,不是 statechart 画图器。
provides.outputs: 每步 snapshot 的 {value, context, status} / 按输入事件排序的转移轨迹 / 当前 actor

peer.note: 状态节点图、时间 scrubber 与 guard 解释面板是消费者；本条只提供可执行快照,消费 AI 自己把 snapshot 映射到任意可视化组件。

boot.note: 三载体一致:纯 JS、无 DOM/worker/wasm/uplink；named exports 已按 XState v5.32.5 的 ESM 入口校对。

example._why: statechart config 深嵌套且 target 记法高歧义,给一个最小可执行对象以校准 createMachine 的真实输入。

isolation.evidence: Headless primitive — pure JS state-machine engine with zero DOM surface (declared supply_form: headless-primitive, no carriers matrix). It touches no document, no window, no styles; it only produces actor snapshots. Trivially shadow-safe because there is nothing to place in the DOM.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to actually execute a statechart with guards, nested states, and an event sequence, instead of only drawing a state diagram, because native static diagrams fail at transition decisions, context changes, and replayable snapshots.
en.why_valuable: AI can only describe or draw a state machine by default; it cannot reliably execute guards, nested/parallel states, and event sequences, and it guesses the state after a rejected transition. XState produces deterministic actor snapshots and transition traces.

data_in.note: data_in.machine passes directly to XState v5 createMachine. Event objects must contain at least a type string; other fields are domain payload, with no predefined universal event vocabulary.

machine.initial: string -- Must match a top-level key in states

<state key>.type?: 'atomic' | 'compound' | 'parallel' | 'final' | 'history' -- Inferred by default from whether child states exist; leaf nodes are atomic
<state key>.initial?: string -- Initial child state; none when there are no child states, and required for compound states with child states
<state key>.states?: same-level states map -- Child states; none by default

on?.<event type>: target string | { target?: string (no target by default), guard?: string|function (none by default), actions?: string|function|(string|function)[] (default []) }

schema.implementations?: { guards?: Record<string,function> (default {}), actions?: Record<string,function> (default {}), actors?: Record<string,actorLogic> (default {}), delays?: Record<string,number|function> (default {}) } -- Second createMachine argument; overall default {}
schema.events?: { type: string, [key: string]: unknown }[] -- Replayed in order; default []
